items.html: Afterwards, through his back, he would illuminate to the Nukva [female], giving her then an illumination from the Mochin in the Netzah-Hod-Yesod of Ima — all of which are the discernment of BON, his and hers — and he gives her only her own, which are the Gevurot of BON of BON; and he also gives her the illumination of the Gevurot of MA of BON. Afterwards, at the time of the Nesirah [sawing apart], the NHY of Aba and Ima withdraw, and two discernments — the Hochma and the Hasadim, both of Aba and of Ima — remain in the secret of Ohr Makif [surrounding Light] over the head of ZA [Zeir Anpin]; and the rest, which are the Binot and the Gevurot, enter the Nukva, and she is grown along the whole of the back, equal to him — for then she takes them themselves, and not merely their illumination as at first. And then the discernment of the Yesod in her is made; for at first, through the mere illumination drawn to her by way of ZA, only the discernment of the Malchut in her was made in her, and now the Yesod in her is made. And they are Zion and Jerusalem, as mentioned elsewhere.
